opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Claire mentioned tidy finishes on a job with Tom Baker Plumbing and Gas Solutions. That stood out.
source_quote: Tom is knowledgeable, professional & efficient. He was able to respond quickly to a leak in my heating & as well as fixing the leak, I also wanted him to fit a new boiler. He gave great advice on the most suitable boiler & the best place to locate it. He worked alone whilst I was out at work & was t
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Claire)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Claire mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
